steps.title: Identify the contrast signal
steps.content: The word Although sets up a contrast between what the government attempted and what actually happened. The key detail is that copies circulated in secret—this reveals the government was trying to prevent the book's availability.

steps.title: Match the suppression intent to the choices
steps.content:
Suppress means to prevent from being published or known.

The government attempted to suppress the novel, yet copies still circulated in secret—the exact contrast the passage establishes.

The other three choices don't address suppressing a book's distribution.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
